The Handy Orchard has numerous trees of heirloom apples, all on state land.
The Handy Orchard is a historic Orchard on state land with heirloom apples. Access: Public.
Pemberton Historical Park, 5561 Plantation Ln, Salisbury, MD 21801, USA
At the back of the clearing, adjacent to the parking lot, there are several black walnut trees. There are also hickory nut trees throughout the trails. Access: Public.
